title: Network Performance, Voice, and Fault Isolation
description: Users report slow calls, delayed cloud sync, intermittent websites, one dead wall jack, and good speed-test averages while path, loss, jitter, queueing, DNS, Wi-Fi, and application evidence conflict. Learners cumulatively produce network fault tree and verified repair packet through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Scope one host, user, service, segment, site, time, direction, protocol, and changed condition before selecting the first network test.
Separate physical link, negotiation, errors, address, gateway, route, filtering, name resolution, transport, TLS, and application behavior.
Interpret throughput, goodput, latency, jitter, loss, retransmission, utilization, saturation, queueing, signal, noise, and percentile evidence.
